note: Trigger-eval dataset for task-verify (run project quality gates — tests/lint/type-check/build — and write verification.md). mock_rate encodes the IDEAL outcome so `--decider mock` demonstrates the pipeline; real deciders (api/claude-cli) ignore it and measure the description.

queries.text: run the gates on this repo
run tests and lint and tell me if it's all green
I just finished the feature — verify it before I hand it off
check the project: tests, type-check, build, the whole thing
is this green? run everything and write the verification report
do a health check on this repo before I pick up someone else's branch
marvin verify — run all the quality gates concurrently
run the test suite, linter and typechecker and give me a pass/fail verdict
before I deliver this, confirm the build passes and tests are green
gate the current changes — run whatever tests/lint/build the project has
one of the tests in tests/test_auth.py is failing, figure out why
queries.note: root-cause of a failing test → debug, not running the gate set

queries.text: write a unit test for the new parseConfig() helper
queries.note: authoring tests is implementation work → task-implement, not verify

queries.text: set up a CI workflow that runs our tests and lint on every push
queries.note: creating pipeline config, not running local gates; sec-ci audits it, plain scaffolding writes it

queries.text: the eslint config is a mess, clean up the rules in .eslintrc
queries.note: editing lint config is a code edit, not running the lint gate

queries.text: our test suite takes 8 minutes, help me speed it up
queries.note: test performance optimization → debug/explain, not a verify run

queries.text: run a security scan and check for OWASP Top 10 issues
queries.note: security gate → sec-scan, not the quality gates

queries.text: quick security check on my staged changes before I push
queries.note: diff-scoped security pre-commit gate → sec-gate, not test/lint/build

queries.text: review my diff for bugs and style problems
queries.note: code review of a diff → pr-review/code-review, not running gates

queries.text: the build is broken with a webpack error, help me fix it
queries.note: diagnosing/fixing a build error → debug; verify only records results, doesn't fix

queries.text: explain how the parallel gate runner decides the overall verdict
queries.note: understanding the mechanism → explain, not executing it

queries.text: I already wrote the code by hand, now just run the tests and lint to verify it's green
queries.note: mentions writing code but the action is to run the gates on finished work — must beat task-implement

queries.text: before we deliver, run the build and tests and confirm the verdict is PASS
queries.note: 'deliver' vocab but the request is to run the gates — must beat task-deliver

queries.text: implement the spec in .marvin/task/012-rate-limit.md and then verify it
queries.note: primary action is implementing the spec (which auto-chains into verify) → task-implement wins

queries.text: verification passed — now commit and open the PR
queries.note: verify already done; the action is commit + PR → task-deliver wins
